name: Jack the Ripper
overview: Jack the Ripper is a 1988 two-part television film/miniseries portraying a fictionalized account of the hunt for Jack the Ripper, the unidentified serial killer responsible for the Whitechapel murders of 1888. The series coincided with the 100th anniversary of the murders.

trailers.title: Jack The Ripper 1988 CBS Mini Series Intro
